evals.expected_output: The skill must stop before reading proposal artifacts or writing spec-workflow-retro.md, ask the user to provide the original prompt document path, and offer short choices plus custom path input for continuing without input-side review.

assertions.text: Stops and asks for the original prompt document path when no $2 is provided.
Does not generate or update spec-workflow-retro.md before the user answers the prompt intake gate.
Uses short choices such as 1 for adding a path and 2 for skipping, while also allowing the user to paste a custom path directly.

evals.prompt: 运行 spec-opti-workflow search-ai-board。补充说明：2
evals.expected_output: The skill may proceed after explicit confirmation, but the output must omit the input-side review section and report that it was skipped by user confirmation.

assertions.text: Proceeds only because the user explicitly confirmed no original prompt document exists.
Omit intake.md creation and omit section 六、输入侧复盘.
Receipt says input-side review was skipped by user confirmation, not silently skipped.

evals.expected_output: The skill should copy the prompt document into intake.md, include the input-side review section, and report the prompt-root-cause distribution.

assertions.text: Creates or updates intake.md with metadata on line 1 and byte-for-byte source content starting on line 2.
Includes section 六、输入侧复盘 with prompt quality attribution.
Receipt includes the intake.md path and attribution ratio ①/②/③.

evals.prompt: 帮我复盘 search-ai-board 这个提案，原始提示词在 /data00/home/lihao.hellohake/.agents/.ai_doc/0_biz_impl/2026-06-20-search-ai-board.md，补充材料看 /tmp/search-ai-board-review.md
evals.expected_output: The skill should parse the proposal name, original prompt document path, and supplemental file from natural language without requiring shell-style $1/$2/$3 arguments.

assertions.text: Treats search-ai-board as the proposal input.
Treats the path after 原始提示词 as the intake document path rather than a supplemental file.
Treats the remaining document path as a supplemental file.
